## Summary

## Scope

-

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked decision/architecture IDs (`AUR-DEC-*` decisions, `AUR-ARCH-*` issues; e.g. `AUR-DEC-012`) in PR body or issue reference
- [ ] Documentation impact: updated, or not required (state why in Summary)
- [ ] Migration notes recorded for any `stable`, `advanced`, or `experimental` surface change (see `docs/api-stability.md`)
- [ ] No mixed mode-only (`chmod`) changes with functional changes
- [ ] Local `npm run verify` passed
- [ ] Local `npm run security:all` passed
- [ ] Added/updated tests when behavior changed
- [ ] No `.local/` or internal-only artifacts included
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
